title: The decline in slum population has slowed in recent years
source: Urban Indicators Database, UN Human Settlements Programme (UN-Habitat). Retrieved from World Development Indicators (EN.POP.SLUM.UR.ZS).
visdescription: This is a line chart with years on the x-axis and the share of the population living in slums on y-axis. Each line is a world bank region.
y_title: Population living in slums (% of urban population), 2000–22
